component.name: Simple Aircraft Manager
component.summary: Track aircraft maintenance, hours, and regulatory compliance

description.p: Simple Aircraft Manager is a maintenance tracker for general-aviation aircraft. It records component hours, time in service, inspections, Airworthiness Directive compliance, squawks, and logbook entries, and computes overall airworthiness status against FAA-style thresholds.

ul.li: Component hours tracking with TBO and replacement-interval alerts
Squawk workflow with priority levels including grounding squawks
Airworthiness Directive recording with compliance history
Oil and fuel consumption tracking with charts
Logbook entry management with optional AI-assisted PDF import
Document storage with collections and a built-in viewer
Read-only public sharing links for mechanics and inspectors

description.p: The desktop build runs entirely on the user's machine — a local SQLite database, a loopback HTTP server, and a webview. No cloud account is required. AI-assisted logbook import is optional and configurable per-provider during first-run setup.
